vocab.meaning_vi: đề nghị hoàn ứng chi phí
vocab.example: Please submit your expense claim before the end of the month.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng nộp đề nghị hoàn ứng chi phí trước cuối tháng.

vocab.example: You need proof of purchase to get reimbursed.
vocab.example_vi: Bạn cần bằng chứng mua hàng để được hoàn tiền.

vocab.example: We use petty cash for small office expenses.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi dùng quỹ tiền mặt nhỏ cho các chi phí văn phòng nhỏ.

vocab.example: I paid for the client dinner out-of-pocket.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã tự chi trả trước bữa tối với khách hàng.

vocab.example: Please submit your form through the finance portal.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng nộp biểu mẫu qua cổng thông tin tài chính.

vocab.meaning_vi: chi phí đi lại theo km
vocab.example: You can claim mileage if you use your own car.
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể yêu cầu hoàn chi phí đi lại nếu dùng xe riêng.

vocab.example: Check the reimbursement policy before your business trip.
vocab.example_vi: Kiểm tra chính sách hoàn ứng trước chuyến công tác của bạn.

vocab.example: The company will reimburse all approved travel expenses.
vocab.example_vi: Công ty sẽ hoàn lại tất cả chi phí đi lại đã được duyệt.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Hi Duc, I need to submit an expense claim for my trip.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance)
lines.text: Sure, do you have proof of purchase for everything?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes, I kept every proof of purchase safely.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance)
lines.text: Good. Did you use petty cash or your own money?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I paid out-of-pocket for the taxi and hotel.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance)
lines.text: Okay, please submit the form through the finance portal.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Should I include mileage for using my own car?

lines.speaker: Duc (finance)
lines.text: Yes, please include mileage if you drove for work.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: How long does the reimbursement usually take?

lines.speaker: Duc (finance)
lines.text: Check the reimbursement policy, it usually takes one week.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Great, I'll submit my expense claim today then.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance)
lines.text: Perfect, we'll reimburse you as soon as it's approved.

questions.q: What did Hoa pay for out-of-pocket?
Where should Hoa submit the expense form?
How long does reimbursement usually take?

shadowing: I need to submit an expense claim for my business trip.
Please keep proof of purchase for everything that you buy.
Last week I paid out-of-pocket for the taxi and hotel.
Don't forget to claim mileage if you drove your own car.
Please check the reimbursement policy before you submit your claim.
